channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Details emerge on Iran's alleged plot to assassinate President Trump
item.description: Israeli officials alerted the Trump administration to a suspected Iranian assassination plot as tensions between the two countries escalate.

item.title: Dwayne Johnson discusses upcoming live-action 'Moana' film
item.description: Johnson, along with co-stars Auli'i Cravalho and Catherine Laga'aia, offers a behind-the-scenes look at the live-action version of the classic animated movie.

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan meet King Charles amid security dispute
item.description: The couple's relationship with the prince's father has been strained.

item.title: Eight indicted for plot to attack Trump UFC event at White House
item.description: Eight people face conspiracy charges for a planned attack on the June UFC event at the White House.
